## Command Reference (Generated)

<!-- Generated by buz_emit_context from zipper registry. Do not edit. -->
<!-- Regenerate: tt/rbw-MG.MarshalGenerate.sh -->

**Folio** is the runtime target value passed to a command (nameplate moniker, role name, etc.).
The Folio column shows how each tabtarget receives it:

- **imprint**: Folio is baked into the filename — one tabtarget per target (e.g., `tt/rbw-cC.Charge.tadmor.sh`)
- **param1**: Folio is passed as a command-line argument (e.g., `tt/rbw-cKB.KludgeBottle.sh tadmor`)
- **—**: No folio needed — standalone command

### Accounts — Service account management (`rbw-a`)

| Colophon | Frontispiece | Folio | Purpose |
|----------|-------------|-------|---------|
| `rbw-aM` | PayorMantlesGovernor | — | Create/replace governor service account |
| `rbw-aC` | GovernorChartersRetriever | — | Charter retriever (image pull) service account |
| `rbw-aK` | GovernorKnightsDirector | — | Knight director (build) service account |
| `rbw-aL` | GovernorListsServiceAccounts | — | List issued service accounts |
| `rbw-aF` | GovernorForfeitsServiceAccount | — | Forfeit a service account |
